name: St. Elias Mines Ltd.
description: St. Elias Mines Ltd. is a junior mineral exploration company primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious and base metal mineral properties. The company focuses its operations on projects located in Peru and British Columbia, Canada. As a resource-focused entity, St. Elias Mines Ltd. is involved in the exploration of gold, silver, copper, and nickel ore deposits, aiming to advance these mineral assets through various stages of development to unlock their economic potential within the mining industry.
